topic: nexus kick claude_code backend multi-slot autopick + slots-list JSON

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_uniprot invocation=tool/uniprot_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

core_5op_kernel.1_intake_topic: nexus kick claude_code backend multi-slot autopick + slots-list JSON. Operator has 12 ~/.claude-claude<N> Pro/Max accounts; default slot 5h/weekly limit blocks kick(ω-cycle) runs; need automatic LRU slot rotation + cooldown caching + slots-list JSON CLI.
2_pre_register_falsifiers: F1 empty_glob_phantom_not_created — running --pick with no slot dirs MUST exit 76 and create no directories (closes feedback_hive_phantom_slot_pitfall)
F2 cooldown_slot_skipped — slot with future limit_until MUST be filtered out of --pick result
F3 full_exhaust_hard_fail — all slots cooled MUST exit 76 with raw 66 reason+fix trailer
F4 limit_hit_auto_fallback — synthetic stream-json rate_limit_event MUST be detectable + slot rotation MUST select next available slot after cooldown mark
F5 codex_gemini_unchanged — this cycle's edits MUST NOT touch state/kick/registry/backends/codex_cli.hexa or gemini_cli.hexa (zero multi-slot keywords introduced)
F6 empty_pool_valid_json_exit0 — empty pool MUST yield valid JSON with summary.total=0, exit 0 (NOT a hard-fail for --list)
F7 json_stdout_only — --json output MUST be parseable JSON on stdout with empty stderr (no log mixing)
F8 phantom_default_hidden — phantom slot (whitespace in suffix) MUST be excluded from --list default; visible only with --include-phantom; counted in summary.phantom
F9 probe_source_null_no_inference — when probe_source is null, ALL session/weekly subfields MUST be null (no inferred percentages; raw 73 honesty triad)

decisions: PHANTOM GUARD: literal-glob `ls -1d $HOME/.claude-claude*` (no shell-side $n expansion); digits-only suffix validation marks ' 1 2 3'-style phantoms; helper NEVER constructs CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR with a non-existent directory

COOLDOWN CACHE: per-slot file ~/.claude-claude<N>/.kick_limit_until (JSON: session{limit_until,captured_at} + weekly{...} + probe_source + last_probe). Co-located with slot dir → naturally GCs with the slot
PICK POLICY: LRU via per-slot ~/.claude-claude<N>/.kick_last_used; missing file = never used = highest priority. RR reserved (no cursor file in MVP)
PROBE SOURCE: enum cache | live_probe | stream_json_signal | null; null implies ALL session/weekly subfields null (no inference)

RATE-LIMIT DETECTION: dual-source — (a) raw `"type":"rate_limit_event"` + `"status":"rejected"` from claude stream-json; (b) hive child terminal-error `Claude Pro/Max plan quota exhausted (<window> window)` text; window discrimination via `seven_day` / `five_hour` substring; resetsAt parse via `"resetsAt":<int>` (preferred) or `Resets at <ISO>` regex
SCOPE: codex_cli + gemini_cli backends UNTOUCHED — multi-slot is a claude_code-specific concept (no env-driven multi-account model in those CLIs)
3_fan_out_axes.correlation_to_falsifier_coverage: 0.30 (low — strategy choices and falsifier list are independently authored; correlation < 0.7 per raw 48)

3_fan_out_axes.falsifiers: 9 falsifiers covering: empty-glob safety (F1), cooldown filter (F2), exhaustion hard-fail (F3), rate-limit detection + rotation (F4), out-of-scope backends untouched (F5), empty-pool graceful (F6), json/stderr separation (F7), phantom visibility default (F8), null probe semantics (F9)

core_5op_kernel.4_tier_1_promotion_gate: Tier-1 promotion gated on: (i) all 9 falsifiers PASS, (ii) helper + dispatch + slots subcommand + registry update all land in same cycle, (iii) commit on hive/main as a single add+commit chain (per nexus-cron-collision feedback), (iv) raw#13 git-hook ban honored (no .git/hooks/* added).

tier_1_promotions.rationale: Literal-glob discovery + digits-only suffix validation + LRU-by-last_used + per-slot co-located cooldown cache eliminates phantom slot creation while providing transparent multi-account rotation; closes feedback_hive_phantom_slot_pitfall at the dispatch layer.

Dual-source rate-limit detection (raw stream-json rate_limit_event + hive terminal-error text) handles both pass-through and re-wrapped output paths from subagent_dispatch; resetsAt parse with int-preferred + ISO-fallback maximizes accuracy without forcing parser fragility.

probe_source=null forces ALL session/weekly subfields to null in the JSON schema — no inferred percentages or 'best-guess' renews_in_days. F9 enforces this. Aligns with raw 73 honesty triad: absence of evidence ≠ evidence of state.

Multi-slot machinery is gated behind backend_slug == "claude_code"; codex_cli/gemini_cli paths remain byte-identical (F5 PASS: zero multi-slot keywords introduced into those registry files). Operator can mix backends via `--backend codex_cli` without slot-pool side effects.

tier_1_implemented.rationale: New 11-fn standalone helper. Modes: --list [--json] [--include-phantom] [--refresh] / --pick [--policy lru|rr] [--exclude <csv>] / --mark-cooldown <slot> --kind <session|weekly> --until-epoch <unix> [--source <s>] / --touch <slot>. CLAUDE_SLOT_TEST_HOME env override added for falsifier harness. Sentinel: __SLOT_PICK_RESULT__ <PASS|FAIL> slot=<N|none> reason=<slug>. raw 80 + raw 66.

Multi-slot loop in spawn block (only when backend_slug == 'claude_code'): pick → exec subagent_dispatch with CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=<dir> → scan output for rate_limit_event signal → mark cooldown + rotate to next slot or break. Hard-fail at empty pool / max_attempts (16) with raw 66 reason+fix. codex_cli/gemini_cli path untouched.

New `nexus kick slots [--json] [--include-phantom] [--refresh]` subcommand wired to claude_slot_pick.hexa. Crucially does NOT use `2>&1` merge to preserve stdout (JSON) / stderr (logs) separation per F7.

Backend registry annotated with multi-slot-pool / slot-helper / slot-policy / slot-cooldown-cache / slot-last-used-cache / slot-rate-limit-signals / phantom-guard / slots-list-cli / multi-slot-landed-{ts,evidence} keys. codex_cli + gemini_cli registry files NOT modified in this cycle (F5 PASS).

falsifier_results.name: empty_glob_phantom_not_created
falsifier_results.evidence: CLAUDE_SLOT_TEST_HOME=<empty_tmpdir> hexa run tool/claude_slot_pick.hexa --pick → rc=76, dirs_after=0 (no .claude-claude* mkdir-ed)
falsifier_results.expected: rc=76 AND no slot directories created post-invocation
falsifier_results.reasoning: literal-glob discovery + early empty-pool exit + no env-side $n expansion path → phantom mkdir impossible; closes feedback_hive_phantom_slot_pitfall

falsifier_results.name: cooldown_slot_skipped
falsifier_results.evidence: tmpdir with slot 1+2; mark-cooldown slot=1 kind=session until-epoch=now+3600 → --pick returns slot=2 dir
falsifier_results.expected: future-cooldown slot excluded from pick candidates
falsifier_results.reasoning: _pick_lru filters slots whose status is 'session_limit' / 'weekly_limit' before LRU sort

falsifier_results.name: full_exhaust_hard_fail
falsifier_results.evidence: both slots cooled → --pick rc=76, stderr contains both 'all-slots-exhausted' AND 'fix=' (raw 66 trailer)
falsifier_results.reasoning: _pick_lru returns -1 when no candidate passes filter; main emits sentinel + raw 66 trailer + exit 76

falsifier_results.name: limit_hit_auto_fallback
falsifier_results.evidence: synthetic stream-json {"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"rejected","rateLimitType":"five_hour","resetsAt":<future_epoch>}}: regex_detect=1, rejected=1, fivehour=1, mark+pick rotation correctly selects next slot
falsifier_results.expected: detection AND rotation to next available slot
falsifier_results.reasoning: _detect_rate_limit_kind matches both raw stream-json and hive terminal-error patterns; _detect_resets_epoch parses int-form resetsAt; dispatch loop tracks tried[] and re-picks excluding it

falsifier_results.name: codex_gemini_unchanged
falsifier_results.evidence: git diff state/kick/registry/backends/codex_cli.hexa: zero multi-slot keywords (multi-slot|claude_slot_pick|slot-helper|slot-policy|kick_limit_until). git diff state/kick/registry/backends/gemini_cli.hexa: same, zero. (Pre-existing diff on gemini_cli.hexa is from earlier 'installed false' probe block — predates this cycle.)
falsifier_results.expected: this-cycle edits introduce zero multi-slot keywords into codex_cli/gemini_cli registry files
falsifier_results.reasoning: multi-slot is gated behind backend_slug == 'claude_code'; backends/ registry edits only landed in claude_code.hexa

falsifier_results.name: empty_pool_valid_json_exit0
falsifier_results.evidence: empty tmpdir → --list --json: rc=0, parsed JSON with summary.total=0
falsifier_results.reasoning: --list path is non-fatal regardless of pool size; --pick is the hard-fail surface

falsifier_results.name: json_stdout_only
falsifier_results.reasoning: helper emits no eprintln on --list success; cli/run.hexa _kick_slots intentionally omits 2>&1-merge so stderr inheritance preserves separation

falsifier_results.name: phantom_default_hidden
falsifier_results.evidence: tmpdir with '.claude-claude1' + '.claude-claude1 2 3'; default --list --json slots=[1]; --include-phantom slots=[1, '1 2 3']; summary.phantom=1 in both
falsifier_results.expected: default excludes phantom from slots[]; --include-phantom restores it; summary.phantom counts both ways
falsifier_results.reasoning: _emit_slots_json computes summary BEFORE phantom-skip check; slots[] respects include_phantom flag

falsifier_results.name: probe_source_null_no_inference
falsifier_results.evidence: real $HOME slots (no probe data): for every slot with probe_source=null, all session.{limit_until, remaining_5h_window_pct} + weekly.{limit_until, remaining_pct, renews_in_days} are also null
falsifier_results.expected: probe_source=null implies all session/weekly numeric fields null
falsifier_results.reasoning: _emit_slots_json hard-codes remaining_5h_window_pct, remaining_pct, renews_in_days to literal null (no synthesis path); session.limit_until / weekly.limit_until use _json_str_or_null which emits null for empty

files_touched_in_cycle: tool/kick_dispatch.hexa (added: 7 helper fns + claude_code multi-slot loop)
cli/run.hexa (added: _kick_slots fn + cmd_kick dispatch + help-text line)
raw_anchors: raw 44 — parent SID propagation (subagent_dispatch contract preserved)
raw 66 — ai-native error message (reason+fix trailer on every hard-fail)
raw 73 — honesty triad (null probe data → null subfields, no inference)
raw 81 — default model = top-tier (claude_code path stays Opus by default)
memory_anchors: feedback_hive_phantom_slot_pitfall — closed by F1 + literal-glob + digits-only suffix validation
feedback_nexus_parallel_cron_commit_collision — followed via single add+commit chain in commit step
project_git_hook_ban_2026_04_26 — verified: no .git/hooks/* writes in this cycle

next_cycle_handoff.live_probe_extension: claude_slot_pick.hexa --refresh currently a no-op stub; future cycle could add a real `claude -p ''` probe when --refresh is set, populating live_probe in probe_source. Cost: one claude invocation per slot per refresh; gate behind explicit user request only.
next_cycle_handoff.rr_policy_cursor: --policy rr accepted but routed to lru in MVP; if operator requests strict round-robin, add a per-pool cursor file (~/.claude-claude.kick_rr_cursor) with single integer slot id, advance on each pick.
next_cycle_handoff.remaining_pct_inference: session.remaining_5h_window_pct + weekly.remaining_pct + renews_in_days are intentionally null. If a future Anthropic API surfaces remaining-quota numerically (currently only resetsAt is exposed in stream-json), add a probe path that populates these without violating raw 73 (must be measured, not inferred from time-since-last-error).
